data.body: EPIC LANDED. All 7 stories submitted through Gerrit as a stacked change (464-470) and MERGED to main atomically; verified present on origin/main. Both gates green on the final patchset (LLM-Review +1 + Verified +1 on every change), and all 7 children + this epic closed via the completion-verifier gate (signed). Completion-verifier round 1 flagged AC-cited test-name mismatches + 2 genuine gaps (unenforced drain gate-budget; missing prune-count/verdict-unchanged/runtime-error tests) — added the AC-named proving tests + made the gate budget measured/logged and the Windows no-op check first, re-pushed (patchset 2), re-verified, and re-closed. Feature: store-wide cross-ticket overlap detection (Cupid digests -> BM25F retrieve -> bounded pairwise judge) on an event-sourced enrichment queue with a Tier-1 opportunistic drain; advisory-only, gated OFF by default (verify.overlap_enabled).
